prompt: Create a realistic cinematic backstage concert photo of a glamorous young East Asian woman kneeling on a dark glossy stage floor, posed in profile with her body arched forward and her forearms resting on a large black touring road case at the left. She looks directly at the camera with a sultry calm expression, long dark wavy hair falling over her shoulder, wearing a tight light gray spaghetti-strap mini dress and metallic silver strappy high-heeled sandals with ankle wraps. The environment is an underground live house or music venue backstage: black curtains, stacked equipment flight cases, cables, a rain-speckled window, drink bottles and cans on top of cases, and a large rear road case labeled “UNDERGROUND LIVE HOUSE LONDON.” Add the number “13” on the front-left case. Use moody low-key club lighting with magenta rim light behind her hair and body, cyan-blue highlights from the window, deep shadows, reflective floor shine, and subtle red/cyan chromatic aberration. Frame as a horizontal 16:9 analog camcorder still, waist-level perspective, subject centered-left, full body visible from head to heels. Add VHS timestamp overlay in the bottom left reading PM 12:27\nOCT. 26 2024, white blocky digital text with slight glow and scanline artifacts. Style should be photorealistic, editorial fashion, gritty music-video backstage atmosphere, slight film grain, soft lens bloom, high detail, no extra people, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a realistic cinematic backstage concert photo of a glamorous young East Asian woman kneeling on a dark glossy stage floor, posed in profile with her body arched forward and her forearms resting on a large black touring road case at the left. She looks directly at the camera with a sultry calm expression, long dark wavy hair falling over her shoulder, wearing a tight light gray spaghetti-strap mini dress and metallic silver strappy high-heeled sandals with ankle wraps. The environment is an underground live house or music venue backstage: black curtains, stacked equipment flight cases, cables, a rain-speckled window, drink bottles and cans on top of cases, and a large rear road case labeled “UNDERGROUND LIVE HOUSE LONDON.” Add the number “13” on the front-left case. Use moody low-key club lighting with magenta rim light behind her hair and body, cyan-blue highlights from the window, deep shadows, reflective floor shine, and subtle red/cyan chromatic aberration. Frame as a horizontal 16:9 analog camcorder still, waist-level perspective, subject centered-left, full body visible from head to heels. Add VHS timestamp overlay in the bottom left reading PM 12:27\nOCT. 26 2024, white blocky digital text with slight glow and scanline artifacts. Style should be photorealistic, editorial fashion, gritty music-video backstage atmosphere, slight film grain, soft lens bloom, high detail, no extra people, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张逼真的电影级后台演唱会照片，画面主体为 一位迷人的东亚年轻女性，她跪在深色光亮的舞台地板上，侧身面对镜头，身体前倾，双臂支撑在左侧一个大型黑色巡演航空箱上。她直视镜头，表情慵懒平静，一头乌黑的长卷发垂在肩上，身穿紧身浅灰色吊带迷你裙，脚蹬金属银色绑带高跟凉鞋。环境为地下 Livehouse 或音乐场地后台：黑色幕布、堆叠的设备航空箱、电缆、布满雨点的窗户、箱顶上的饮料瓶和易拉罐，以及一个贴有“UNDERGROUND LIVE HOUSE LONDON”标签的大型后置航空箱。在左前方的箱子上添加数字“13”。使用情绪化的低调俱乐部灯光，头发和身体后方带有洋红色轮廓光，窗户透出青蓝色高光，阴影深邃，地板反光，并带有细微的红/青色色差。画面构图为 16:9 横向模拟摄像机静帧，腰部视角，主体位于中左侧，全身可见。在左下角添加 VHS 时间戳叠加层，显示为 PM 12:27\nOCT. 26 2024，白色块状数字文本，带有轻微的发光效果和扫描线伪影。风格应为照片级真实感、时尚编辑风格、粗粝的音乐录影带后台氛围、轻微的胶片颗粒感、柔和的镜头光晕、高细节，无额外人物，无水印。
